title: Heavens Ages
description: Heavens Ages is a modpack for the Heavens Heights minecraft server. This pack is made to run on mid-low end computers on low graphics relatively well.
body: Heavens Ages is a modpack for the Heavens Heights minecraft server. This pack is made to run on mid-low end computers relativley well. This modpack does not include many mods but some of the *star* mods are, -Epic Knights and Armour - Small Ships -Immersive Aircraft -Create. This modpack includes 67 mods most of which being librarys.
